title: [security] Non-constant-time comparison of X25519 shared secret in EDHOC
description: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:635 and 1071: `if g_xy.as_bytes() == &[0; KEY_LEN_32]` uses non-CT == (short-circuit memcmp). Use subtle::ConstantTimeEq instead. Timing oracle on DH result before HKDF-Extract. P0. See also zeroization intent at drop(g_xy).
